Panjim, Goa · Est. 2024

Slow down.
Stay awhile.

Fika is the Swedish art of pausing — a moment of coffee, calm, and connection. In the heart of Panaji, we've built a little corner of that feeling.

Explore Menu Find Us
★★★★★
4.6
579 Google Reviews
A Green & Spacious Retreat

Tucked into the elegant Portuguese architecture of Campal, Fika blends Goa's laid-back warmth with Scandinavian-inspired calm. A neighbourhood spot that's part café, part co-working space, part sanctuary.

Whether you're catching up over brunch, exploring the all-day menu, or simply sitting with a perfectly brewed cup — this is a place that encourages you to exhale.

All-Day Breakfast Specialty Coffee Pet-Friendly 🐾 Co-Working Live Music Indoor + Outdoor

Worth the trip alone

What everyone is talking about

From the Tiramisu Pancake that reviewers can't stop mentioning, to the Mango Matcha Latte that's become a Panjim icon — these are the dishes that'll have you planning your next visit before you've left.

  • Tiramisu Iced Latte₹520
  • Mango Matcha Latte₹450
  • Tiramisu Pancake₹450
  • Chorizo Egg Benedict₹480
  • Vietnamese Coffee₹380
  • Cracked Potatoes₹350
What people say

Loved by Panjim

★★★★★
"Fika beautifully captures the true meaning of 'Fika' — slowing down, pausing from the rush, and sharing meaningful moments over a great cup."
Akshay Ganvir · Local Guide
★★★★★
"The Vietnamese iced mocha and Mango Matcha were out of this world. A nice quaint speakeasy tucked in the heart of Panjim."
Divya Muraleedharan · Local Guide
★★★★★
"Being a chef, I am quite particular about flavours and technique — and Fika delivered beautifully across the board."
Geetanjali Sharma · Chef
★★★★★
"Warm and welcoming staff, a special pet menu, and our Labrador was treated like royalty. Truly a place for everyone."
Priyam Ravi · Local Guide
★★★★★
"The best dish was the Tiramisu pancakes. A warm atmosphere with friendly people — absolutely worth it every time."
Meghna Kalita
★★★★★
"A real gem. The moment you step in, you're greeted with a lovely laid-back vibe blending Goan warmth with elegant design."
Saiel Kumarjuvekar · Local Guide, 169 reviews
